description: Multi-tenant SaaS for monitoring company or public figure news, scoring article reputation risk, and alerting teams via Slack, email, and SMS.

userStories.title: Add workspace and membership schema
userStories.description: As a platform operator, I need workspace, membership, and invitation records so that customer data is isolated by tenant.
acceptanceCriteria: Add workspace, membership, and invitation tables with tenant-scoped foreign keys
Workspace-scoped uniqueness is enforced for invitation email and membership pairings
Add indexes needed for workspace-scoped queries
Migration applies successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add monitoring target schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need monitoring target records so that companies and people can be tracked independently inside each workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Add monitoring target table with type, display name, note, status, and default threshold fields
Support target status values needed for the review lifecycle before activation
Each target belongs to exactly one workspace
Migration applies successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add keyword schema for seed, expanded, and excluded terms
userStories.description: As a developer, I need structured keyword records so that search terms can be generated automatically but still reviewed by users.
acceptanceCriteria: Add target keyword table with source type values for seed, expanded, and excluded keywords
Store keyword active state and display order for each monitoring target
Each keyword belongs to exactly one monitoring target
Migration applies successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add article ingestion schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need article candidate and canonical article records so that search hits and source articles can be stored idempotently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add article candidate and article tables for portal search hits and canonical article records
Store portal URL, source URL, canonical URL, normalized title hash, body hash, and ingestion status fields
Add uniqueness constraints or indexes that support idempotent article upserts
Migration applies successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add analysis and alert schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need analysis and alert records so that article scoring and delivery state are persisted and auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add article analysis, alert policy, alert event, and alert delivery tables
Analysis schema stores relevance score, topic labels, summary, risk score, risk band, rationale, model version, and timestamps
Alert delivery schema stores channel, final status, and failure reason
Migration applies successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add workspace creation and invitation backend
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to create a workspace and invite teammates so that multiple operators can manage the same monitoring scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Add backend actions or endpoints to create a workspace and invite a teammate by email
Only workspace admins can create invitations
Accepting an invitation creates a membership in the correct workspace
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add monitoring target creation backend
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and edit monitoring targets so that the system knows which company or person to watch.
acceptanceCriteria: Add backend action or endpoint to create a target with type, display name, note, threshold, and seed keywords
Reject target creation when no seed keyword is provided
New targets are saved with review-required status
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add target discovery and expansion job
userStories.description: As a user, I want the system to build an initial target profile so that I can verify the subject before collection begins.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a background job that runs web search for a target's seed keywords
Call the LLM to generate a target summary, related entities, aliases, and expanded keyword candidates
Persist generated profile data without activating the target
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add target review and activation backend
userStories.description: As a user, I want to record whether the generated target profile matches my intended subject so that unrelated collection stays blocked.
acceptanceCriteria: Add backend action or endpoint to save review decisions: match, partial_match, and mismatch
Targets remain non-collecting until an explicit activation decision is recorded
Mismatch decisions can reopen the target for keyword editing
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add keyword management backend
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit expanded and excluded keywords so that search coverage is broad but controllable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add backend actions or endpoints to add, remove, disable, and reorder target keywords
Preserve keyword source type for seed, expanded, and excluded entries
Only active keywords are returned in the collector input set
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement portal search collector
userStories.description: As an operator, I want active targets searched in Naver, Nate, and Google News so that new coverage is discovered automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a scheduled collector that queries Naver, Nate, and Google News for active targets
Collector input includes active seed and expanded keywords plus excluded keywords
Each search hit is stored as an article candidate with portal metadata and crawl status
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement original article fetch and canonical dedupe
userStories.description: As a system, I want original article pages fetched and merged idempotently so that analysis runs on canonical article content.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch the original article when a candidate contains a source article URL
Extract body text plus available author, publisher, publish time, and view count fields
Upsert canonical articles using source URL, canonical URL, normalized title hash, and body hash
Failed fetches record a retryable failure status and reason
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement target relevance scoring
userStories.description: As a user, I want the system to score whether an article is actually about my target so that false positives are easier to suppress.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an analysis step that computes a target relevance score for each canonical article
Store the matched keywords or entity signals used for the relevance decision
Only articles with completed ingestion are eligible for this step
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement topic classification
userStories.description: As a user, I want articles categorized by topic so that I can review reputation risk by theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an analysis step that assigns one or more topic labels to each article
Persist topic labels on the article analysis record
Topic classification can be rerun without creating duplicate analysis rows
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement article summary generation
userStories.description: As a user, I want short summaries of collected articles so that I can triage faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an analysis step that generates a summary of at most three sentences for each article
Summary generation records model version and completion timestamp
Existing summaries are replaced when a reanalysis request is issued
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement risk scoring and rationale
userStories.description: As a user, I want a 0-100 risk score with rationale so that I can prioritize high-risk coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an analysis step that stores risk score, risk band, and human-readable rationale for each article
Risk bands map consistently from the stored numeric score
Risk scoring records model version and completion timestamp
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add alert settings backend
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to configure thresholds and delivery channels so that alerts match our operating process.
acceptanceCriteria: Add backend actions or endpoints to save workspace-level and target-level alert thresholds
Add validation for Slack webhook, email recipient, and SMS recipient settings before saving
Effective alert policy resolution prefers target overrides over workspace defaults
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement immediate high-risk alert dispatch
userStories.description: As a user, I want high-risk articles delivered immediately so that I can react before the story spreads.
acceptanceCriteria: Create an alert event when an article's risk score meets or exceeds the effective threshold
Dispatch immediate alerts to enabled Slack, email, and SMS channels
Each delivery stores channel, payload reference, sent_at, and final status
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement one-minute alert batching
userStories.description: As a user, I want multiple high-risk articles found within one minute grouped together so that alert noise is reduced.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a one-minute batching job that groups new high-risk alert events by workspace and target
Batch alerts include the highest-risk article plus aggregate counts
Immediate alert records are not duplicated when a batch alert is generated
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add article feed query API
userStories.description: As a user, I want filtered article queries so that the dashboard can show the exact monitoring slice I need.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a query endpoint or server action that returns articles with target, risk band, topic, date range, publisher, and sort filters
Default sort returns highest-risk articles first
Results include title, target name, risk score, topic labels, publisher, author, and publish time
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add article detail query API
userStories.description: As a user, I want a single article detail query so that the UI can show summary, rationale, and source links.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a query endpoint or server action that returns one article with summary, rationale, matched keywords, and source URLs
Detail response includes ingestion and analysis timestamps
Requests for articles outside the caller's workspace are rejected
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add analytics aggregation API
userStories.description: As a user, I want aggregate metrics by topic, publisher, and reporter so that recurring risk patterns are visible.
acceptanceCriteria: Add aggregation queries for high-risk article counts by topic, publisher, and reporter over a selected date range
Aggregation queries support optional filtering by monitoring target
Each aggregation row can be linked back to the matching article IDs for drilldown
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add workspace members UI
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want a members page so that I can invite teammates and see who has access.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a members management screen that lists current members and pending invitations
Admins can submit an invite by entering an email address
Non-admin users do not see invite controls
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add monitoring target registration UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want a target creation form so that I can start a new monitoring workflow without manual database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a target creation form with entity type, display name, note, threshold, and seed keywords
Form prevents submission when no seed keyword is entered
Successful submission lands on the review workflow for the new target
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add target review UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to review the generated target profile so that I can confirm the subject before activation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a review screen that shows generated summary, related entities, aliases, and keyword candidates
User can mark the target as match, partial_match, or mismatch
Activation is unavailable until a review decision is saved
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add keyword editor UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit expanded and excluded keywords so that the collector uses the right search terms.
acceptanceCriteria: Add keyword management UI with separate sections for seed, expanded, and excluded keywords
Users can add, disable, and remove keywords from the review and edit flow
Saved keyword changes are reflected when the target is activated
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add alert settings UI
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want an alert settings page so that I can manage thresholds and channels without editing configuration manually.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an alert settings screen for workspace defaults and target-specific overrides
Screen exposes Slack, email, and SMS channel forms with inline validation errors
Saved settings reflect the effective threshold and enabled channels
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add live article dashboard UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want a live article dashboard so that I can triage high-risk coverage quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a dashboard view that shows title, target, risk score, topic labels, publisher, author, and publish time
Dashboard includes filters for target, risk band, topic, date range, and publisher plus highest-risk and newest sort options
New articles can appear on the screen without a full page reload
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add article detail UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want article details alongside the feed so that I can inspect why a story was flagged.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an article detail panel or page that shows summary, risk rationale, matched keywords, and source links
Detail view is reachable from the dashboard article list
Detail view shows the latest stored analysis timestamps
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add analytics dashboard UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want analytics views for topic, publisher, and reporter trends so that I can identify repeat risk sources.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an analytics screen with topic, publisher, and reporter high-risk summaries for a selected date range
Analytics view supports optional target filtering
Clicking an aggregate row opens the matching article list drilldown
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
